prompt: Emberhollow key art showing Bellroot Town in the foreground and the glowing mouth of Echo Cave beyond, with a lantern-lit adventurer facing the cave
scene: storybook frontier town at dusk with crooked roofs, warm windows, hanging lanterns, pine silhouettes, and a glowing cave entrance deeper in the valley
subject: lantern-lit first-person fantasy adventure world; welcoming town in front, dangerous mystery beyond
style: painted fantasy key art with polished game-cover readability and stylized realism
composition: wide cinematic establishing shot; town lower left, cave deeper center-right, generous clean space in the upper right for title treatment
lighting: warm lantern glow against cool twilight air, subtle mist, soft god rays from the cave mouth
palette: amber lanterns, teal cave glow, dusk blue sky, weathered cedar browns
materials: painted wood grain, cobblestone, mossy rock, linen banners, soft volumetric fog
constraints: no text; no logos; no watermark; readable focal separation; suitable for a game start screen
negative: photobashing artifacts, muddy detail, cluttered skyline, over-saturated neon, hard bloom
